html:query.declare: <FILTRO salida="HTML" oi_empresa="1" cb_confidenciales="T" e_periodo="202001" oi_forma_pago="" orden1="" orden2="" oi_user="lvergara"><LIQUIDACIONES/></FILTRO>

GROUP.noreg: No se encontraron registros para los filtros seleccionados.
No se encontraron registros para los filtros seleccionados.

qry:select.name: QRY_LIQUIDACIONES
QRY_RECIBOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT {%? (#FILTRO:@orden1!=''){% max({%=#FILTRO:@orden1 %}) as orden1,%}{% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@orden2!=''){% max({%=#FILTRO:@orden2 %}) as orden2,%}{% %} %} LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS LEG, Max(LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_ubicacion) as UBI, max(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa_ddo) as oi_empresa_ddo, max(LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_cta_bancaria) as c_cta_bancaria, max(LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.d_ape_y_nom) as d_ape_y_nom, max(LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_nro_cuil) as c_nro_cuil, max(PER31_FORMAS_PAGO.d_forma_pago) as d_forma_pago, max(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_sbasico) as n_sbasico, sum(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totsret) as n_totsret, sum(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totpag) as n_totpag, sum(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totnsret) as n_totnsret, sum(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totdesc) as n_totdesc, sum(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totasig) as n_totasig, sum(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totant) as n_totant, sum(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totemb) as n_totemb, sum(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totcont) as n_totcont, max(LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_cbu) as c_cbu, max(ORG08_CS_COSTO.d_centro_costo) as d_centro_costo FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ99_RECIBOS, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION, ORG03_EMPRESAS, PER31_FORMAS_PAGO, ORG03_UBICACIONES(ORG03_UBICACIONES.oi_empresa={%=#PARAM:@oi_empresa%}), ORG08_CS_COSTO JOIN LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa INNER ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion INNER LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa INNER LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_empresa, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.c_forma_pago LEFT OUTER PER31_FORMAS_PAGO.c_forma_pago, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_ubicacion LEFT OUTER ORG03_UBICACIONES.c_ubicacion, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_centro_costo_ult INNER ORG08_CS_COSTO.c_centro_costo WHERE LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_estado = \'F\' and ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = {#PARAM:@oi_empresa} {%? (#PARAM:@e_periodo!='') {% AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.e_periodo = {#PARAM:@e_periodo} %} {% %} %} {%? (string(#PARAM:LIQUIDACIONES/LIQUIDACION/@id)!='') {% AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion IN ({%=string(#PARAM:LIQUIDACIONES/LIQUIDACION/@id)%}) %} {% %} %} {%? ((#PARAM:@e_periodo='') and (string(#PARAM:LIQUIDACIONES/LIQUIDACION/@id)='')) {% and 1=2 %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@l_simulacion!='') {% AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.l_simulacion = {%= #FILTRO:@l_simulacion %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_forma_pago!='') {% AND PER31_FORMAS_PAGO.oi_forma_pago = {#FILTRO:@oi_forma_pago} %} {% %} %} {%? (#PARAM:@cb_confidenciales != '' and #FILTRO:@cb_confidenciales!='T' ) {% {%? (#PARAM:@cb_confidenciales = 'C') {% AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.l_confidencial = 1%}{% AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.l_confidencial = 0 %} %} %} {% %} %} GROUP BY LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo ORDER BY {%? (#FILTRO:@orden1!='') {% orden1 ASC, %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@orden2!='') {% orden2 ASC, %} {% %} %} LEG ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DATOS_EMPRESA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ93_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, LIQ93_EMPRESAS.d_empresa FROM LIQ93_EMPRESAS WHERE LIQ93_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_empresa_ddo} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' and id={#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp}')/ROWS/ROW
